---
title: 'Talking Vs Music'
date: '2013-03-24T21:18:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Towdah: tō·dä'''
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2404314895580829197'
blogger_filename: '/2013/03/talking-vs-music.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Towdah_ tō·dä_/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Insight'
---

<br />
<br />
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;">
Music has more positive effect on growing plants than talking or nothing. See this Myth Busters Episode</div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://dsc.discovery.com/fansites/mythbusters/episode/episode-tab-02.html" href="http://dsc.discovery.com/fansites/mythbusters/episode/episode-tab-02.html" target="_blank">Myth Busters-Talking to Plants</a></div>
